task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or main authenticated web interface is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the specific complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details page is visible, with the case title 'HazMat-Spill-2024-001' clearly displayed in the header, breadcrumbs, or case summary section.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the process to add a location to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Location', 'Add Location', or similar form/modal is open within the context of the complaint case, or the Locations tab is actively being edited.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct structured address details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address input fields or the final saved record display the street as '2500 East Second Street', the city as 'Reno', the state as 'NV' (or Nevada), and the zip code as '89595'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the correct location type and saved the record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location type field is set to either 'Incident' or 'Business', and the location appears as a saved, structured record in the case's location list or module.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ArkCase web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser (e.g., clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than a terminal window executing API commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the ArkCase application, not a text editor, notes app, or a generic web search displaying the address.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not spoof the result using a local HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's address bar should show a standard ArkCase application URL (e.g., an IP address or localhost port associated with the app), not a file:// path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target complaint case is titled 'HazMat-Spill-2024-001'. The required structured location details to be added are: Street: '2500 East Second Street', City: 'Reno', State: 'NV', Zip: '89595'. The location type must be selected as either 'Incident' or 'Business'.
